title: The Silent Sip
openingIncident: The victim, Amelia Hart, was found slumped over her desk with a half‑filled mug of coffee, the room unusually quiet after the midday rush.

suspects.name: David Reed
suspects.statement: I was reviewing the quarterly report on the desk when Amelia stepped away.
suspects.alibiClaim: I was at my workstation reviewing documents at 14:30.

suspects.name: Mark Lawson
suspects.statement: I was finalising the spreadsheet on the monitor when the incident occurred.
suspects.alibiClaim: I was on a video call at my desk at 14:30 and could not have been near the mug.

suspects.name: Lena Patel
suspects.statement: I was adjusting the lamp to get better light for my sketch.
suspects.alibiClaim: I was at the lamp fixing its angle at 14:30.

clues.title: Desk Observation
clues.detail: The desk was tidy with only the open report visible, matching my claim.

clues.title: Monitor Status
clues.detail: The monitor was switched off and the desk drawer was open, indicating no video call was active and the victim was still at the desk, contradicting the claimed alibi. Time of death recorded at 14:30.

clues.title: Mug‑Monitor Connection
clues.detail: A faint residue of fast‑acting toxin is visible on the rim of the Mug, and the Monitor being off shows Mark Lawson was not on a video call, meaning he could have been at the desk to slip the poison into the Mug.

clues.title: Lamp Position
clues.detail: The lamp was tilted slightly to the left, as I remembered adjusting it.

clues.title: Spilled Coffee
clues.detail: A small spill of coffee near the Mug suggests someone may have been nervous.

solution.motive: Financial pressure after discovering the victim intended to expose the killer's embezzlement.
solution.method: Poisoned coffee administered by slipping a fast‑acting toxin into the mug while the victim was distracted.
solution.opportunity: Because the Monitor was off, Mark Lawson could not have been on a video call and was therefore free to approach the desk; the open desk drawer and the Mug’s proximity to the Monitor place him within arm’s reach to add the toxin to the coffee.
